news.title: Boehringer hands over funding, marketing rights for Click’s digital therapeutic

news.title: J&J launches latest version of its pulsed ablation device after nabbing CE Mark

news.title: Avalyn plans IPO to fund phase 3 trials of inhaled versions of approved respiratory drugs
news.snippet: Avalyn Pharma is eyeing an IPO as the biotech seeks more funds to take its inhaled versions of approved drugs for lung conditions into phase 3 trials.

news.title: Medline hit with FDA warning letter over defective heart syringes, safety hazards

news.title: AbbVie challenges 'outdated' 340B drug discount program guidance in new lawsuit

news.title: Steven Ubl set to depart after more than a decade as CEO of PhRMA
news.snippet: After more than a decade in charge of the most influential organization representing the U.S. pharmaceutical industry, PhRMA, Steve Ubl will step down as its CEO at the end of the year.

news.title: Shionogi nabs initial $119M award from BARDA to establish US antibiotic plant
news.snippet: Japan’s Shionogi is joining the spate of drugmakers to unveil a U.S. manufacturing commitment, albeit under slightly different circumstances than its peers.

news.title: J&J's Tremfya retakes TV drug ad spending crown from AbbVie
news.snippet: Johnson & Johnson’s immunology drug Tremfya is looking to challenge AbbVie’s dominance in 2026, securing the top spot as the biggest TV drug ad spender in March.

news.title: Pfizer walks away from 'underutilized' office space in South San Francisco, transitions employees to remote roles
news.snippet: The company is moving out of the building that used to house the headquarters of its 2022-acquired Global Blood Therapeutics.

news.title: Biogen settles investor lawsuit over its messaging on failed Alzheimer's drug Aduhelm
news.snippet: Biogen has agreed to a settlement with investors who claimed the company misled them in describing how it gained a controversial FDA approval for failed Alzheimer’s treatment, Aduhelm.

news.snippet: Cognito Therapeutics is partnering with a nonprofit to drop the "D-Word," aiming to eliminate the use of “dementia,” a catchall term that can carry stigma.

news.title: STAT+: Biotech VCs, used to a winning formula in drug development, face disruption

news.title: New light shed on who benefits most from weight-loss jabs
news.snippet: People who carry variations in two genes linked to appetite and digestion can lose more weight when taking drugs to treat obesity, research suggests.

news.title: Prince William praises £20m milestone for Bowelbabe fund
news.snippet: The Bowelbabe fund, set up by Dame Deborah James in 2022, helps to support Cancer Research UK.

news.title: Weight-loss jabs will be offered on NHS for people at risk of further heart attacks
news.snippet: More than a million people in England will start being offered the anti-obesity jab for better heart health and to avoid strokes.

news.title: 'Something wasn't right': Wrong sperm given to UK families by IVF clinics in northern Cyprus
news.snippet: Families of seven children believe the wrong sperm or egg donors were used in their IVF treatment.
